title: Well-Known Labels, Annotations and Taints — kubernetes.io/config.mirror
text:
Type: Annotation
Example:
kubernetes.io/config.mirror: "df7cc47f8477b6b1226d7d23a904867b"
Used on: Pod
For a static Pod created by the kubelet on a node, a
mirror Pod
is created on the API server. The kubelet adds an annotation to indicate that this Pod is
actually a mirror Pod. The annotation value is copied from the
kubernetes.io/config.hash
annotation, which is the UID of the Pod.
When updating a Pod with this annotation set, the annotation cannot be changed or removed.
If a Pod doesn't have this annotation, it cannot be added during a Pod update.
